codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit 0c30f2d, the worker handoff, and the transcript skeleton. The feature delivers the requested bridge-backed thread list states, visible status and workspace/repo context, and local search/filter narrowing/restoration behavior for VAL-THREAD-001/002/003. I did not find in-scope correctness or regression issues in the reviewed implementation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mobile-worker skill still requires manual local-target verification, but this mission's headless mobile review flow is already relying on widget-test-based UI verification as the practical fallback. The skill should document that fallback explicitly so workers are not marked as deviating when they follow the actual operating model.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback marks followedProcedure=false only because step 6 was replaced with widget tests; the transcript skeleton shows Flutter test/analyze runs but no simulator session; `.factory/skills/mobile-worker/SKILL.md` step 6 says to manually verify on a local target, while the handoff suggests allowing widget-test-based verification as an explicit fallback.

summary: Pass. The reviewed thread-list feature satisfies the scoped validation behaviors without identified code defects. One shared-state skill-gap observation was recorded for the mobile-worker manual-verification guidance.
